title: MiniCoal
description: This mod is very simple, it adds two items Mini Coal and Mini Charcoal that cook one item each.
body:
# MiniCoal
This mod is very simple, it adds two items Mini Coal and Mini Charcoal that cook one item each.

Older versions available [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minicoal)
